sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ خُلُقٌ عَظِيمٌ يُحِبُّهُ اللهُ وَرَسُولُهُ.
sentences.translation: Iskrenost je plemenita osobina koju vole Allah i Njegov Poslanik.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness is a great character trait loved by Allah and His Messenger.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، حَدِيثٌ رَقْمُ ٦٠٩٤].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: 'Budite iskreni, jer iskrenost vodi ka dobročinstvu' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o adabu, hadis br. 6094].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'You must be truthful, for truthfulness leads to righteousness' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners, Hadith No. 6094].

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ الصَّادِقُ يَقُولُ الْحَقَّ دَائِمًا وَلَا يَكْذِبُ أَبَدًا فِي كَلَامِهِ.
sentences.translation: Iskren musliman uvijek govori istinu i nikada ne laže u svom govoru.
sentences.translationEn: A truthful Muslim always speaks the truth and never lies in his speech.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْخُلُقُ الْكَرِيمُ يَبْنِي الثِّقَةَ وَالْمَحَبَّةَ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj plemeniti ahlak gradi povjerenje i ljubav među ljudima u zajednici.
sentences.translationEn: This noble character builds trust and love among people in society.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَقْتَدِي بِالنَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ الَّذِي كَانَ يُلَقَّبُ بَيْنَ قَوْمِهِ بِالصَّادِقِ الْأَمِينِ.
sentences.translation: Mi se ugledamo na Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, koji je među svojim narodom bio poznat kao 'Istinoljubivi i Povjerljivi'.
sentences.translationEn: We follow the example of the Prophet (peace be upon him), who was known among his people as 'The Truthful and Trustworthy'.
